params.team_info: Brazil 2002 Pentacampeão XI — Marcos (GK), Cafu, Lúcio, Roque Júnior, Roberto Carlos, Gilberto Silva, Kléberson, Ronaldinho, Rivaldo, Ronaldo Nazário, Edmílson — 4-3-3 attacking formation, Brazil's 5th World Cup title in Yokohama Japan-Korea final

params.event_info: Brazil 2-0 Germany 2002 World Cup Final Retrospective — Ronaldo Nazário's brace seals 5th title in Yokohama, redemption arc 4 years after the 1998 final illness, Cafu becomes only player to play in three WC finals

params.team_info: England 1966 World Cup Winning XI — Gordon Banks (GK), George Cohen, Ray Wilson, Nobby Stiles, Jack Charlton, Bobby Moore (C), Alan Ball, Roger Hunt, Bobby Charlton, Geoff Hurst, Martin Peters — 4-3-3 wingless wonders formation, Sir Alf Ramsey, Wembley Stadium July 30 1966

params.event_info: Geoff Hurst's Hat-trick — 1966 World Cup Final England 4-2 West Germany Multi-Angle Analysis — the only hat-trick in a World Cup Final history, the controversial Russian linesman goal that crossed (or didn't cross) the line, 'they think it's all over... it is now'
